name: MSI PRO X870E-P WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB4 Type-C (DP1.4 Alt mode) - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (X870EPWIFI)
shortName: MSI PRO X870E-P WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16
description: Professional ATX motherboard with AM5 socket and DDR5 support, offering Wi-Fi 7 and USB4 connectivity.
